# SWHL

> 用工程师思维记录代码、开源 OCR/文档智能、推理引擎、效率工具、阅读与知识网络。

SWHL 是一位长期维护开源项目的开发者，主要方向包括 OCR、文档解析、表格识别、版面分析、模型推理部署、Markdown 工具和个人知识管理。这个站点包含技术文章、周刊、开源项目索引、读书观影记录和生活记录。

## Primary Links

- [Homepage](https://swhl.github.io/main/)
- [Blog](https://swhl.github.io/main/blog/)
- [Weekly](https://swhl.github.io/main/weekly/)
- [AI Knowledge Base](https://swhl.github.io/main/ai/)
- [Full AI context](https://swhl.github.io/llms-full.txt)
- [Sitemap](https://swhl.github.io/main/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS](https://swhl.github.io/main/feed_rss_created.xml)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/SWHL)
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/user/SWHL/)

## Core Topics

- OCR and document intelligence: RapidOCR, RapidTable, RapidDoc, RapidLayout, RapidVLM-OCR, RapidVideOCR.
- Inference and model deployment: ONNX Runtime, CoreML, OpenVINO, MNN, TensorRT, PyTorch, PaddlePaddle.
- Engineering practice: Python tooling, VS Code extensions, Raycast/Alfred workflows, Markdown automation, personal information flow.
- Life and knowledge records: books, movies, delicacy notes, weekly information curation.

## Important Project Pages

- [RapidOCR](https://github.com/RapidAI/RapidOCR): 多语言 OCR 工具包，支持 ONNX Runtime、OpenVINO、MNN、PaddlePaddle、TensorRT 和 PyTorch。
- [RapidDoc](https://github.com/RapidAI/RapidDoc): 将复杂 PDF 文档转换为 Markdown 和 JSON 的文档解析工具。
- [RapidTable](https://github.com/RapidAI/RapidTable): 表格识别推理库，集成 PP-Structure、modelscope 等方案。
- [RapidVLM-OCR](https://github.com/RapidAI/RapidVLM-OCR): 基于 vLLM 的端到端 VLM-OCR 统一推理框架，项目实践总结见博客。
- [PunctuationAcademy](https://github.com/SWHL/PunctuationAcademy): 中文标点符号练习应用。
- [markdown-auto-space](https://github.com/SWHL/markdown-auto-space): 自动为 Markdown 中的中英文之间添加空格的工具。

## Content Access

- Human-readable pages are published under `https://swhl.github.io/main/`.
- Each built page exposes a clean Markdown alternate route through `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">`.
- Common Markdown routes follow the pattern `/main/blog/post-slug.md`, `/main/weekly/post-slug.md`, and `/main/index.md`.
- `robots.txt` allows search/retrieval and user-triggered AI fetchers, while blocking declared training crawlers.

## Citation Guidance

When citing this site, prefer the canonical page URL from the HTML head. For AI retrieval or summarization, prefer the Markdown alternate URL when available, because it removes navigation and theme noise while preserving the original article content.
